AM-Advana-Auth-Header.name: AM-Advana-Auth-Header
AM-Advana-Auth-Header.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<AssignMessage async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="AM-Advana-Auth-Header">
    <DisplayName>AM-Advana-Auth-Header</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <Set>
        <Headers>
            <Header name="Authorization">Bearer {advanaToken}</Header>
        </Headers>
    </Set>
    <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
    <AssignTo createNew="false" transport="http" type="request"/>
</AssignMessage>

EV-AdvanaTokenResponse.name: EV-AdvanaTokenResponse
EV-AdvanaTokenResponse.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ExtractVariables async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="EV-AdvanaTokenResponse">
    <DisplayName>EV-AdvanaTokenResponse</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
    <JSONPayload>
        <Variable name="advanaToken">
            <JSONPath>$.access_token</JSONPath>
        </Variable>
        <Variable name="expiryTime">
            <JSONPath>$.expires_in</JSONPath>
        </Variable>
    </JSONPayload>
    <Source>advanaTokenResponse.content</Source>
</ExtractVariables>

JS-CacheExpiry.name: JS-CacheExpiry
JS-CacheExpiry.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<Javascript async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" timeLimit="200" name="JS-CacheExpiry">
    <DisplayName>JS-CacheExpiry</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <ResourceURL>jsc://CacheExpiry.js</ResourceURL>
</Javascript>

KVM-Advana-Token.name: KVM-Advana-Token
KVM-Advana-Token.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<KeyValueMapOperations async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="KVM-Advana-Token" mapIdentifier="Advana-Token-Map">
    <DisplayName>KVM-Advana-Token</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <Get assignTo="private.advana_client_id" index="1">
        <Key>
            <Parameter>advana_client_id</Parameter>
        </Key>
    </Get>
    <Get assignTo="private.advana_client_secret" index="1">
        <Key>
            <Parameter>advana_client_secret</Parameter>
        </Key>
    </Get>
    <Get assignTo="private.advana_scopes" index="1">
        <Key>
            <Parameter>advana_client_scopes</Parameter>
        </Key>
    </Get>
    <Scope>environment</Scope>
</KeyValueMapOperations>

LC-Advana-Token.name: LC-Advana-Token
LC-Advana-Token.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<LookupCache async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="LC-Advana-Token">
    <DisplayName>LC-Advana-Token</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <CacheKey>
        <Prefix/>
        <KeyFragment ref="client_id"/>
    </CacheKey>
    <CacheResource>advana-token-cache</CacheResource>
    <Scope>Exclusive</Scope>
    <AssignTo>advanaToken</AssignTo>
</LookupCache>

PC-Advana-Token.name: PC-Advana-Token
PC-Advana-Token.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<PopulateCache async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="PC-Advana-Token">
    <DisplayName>PC-Advana-Token</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <CacheKey>
        <Prefix/>
        <KeyFragment ref="client_id"/>
    </CacheKey>
    <CacheResource>advana-token-cache</CacheResource>
    <Scope>Exclusive</Scope>
    <ExpirySettings>
        <TimeoutInSeconds ref="expiryTime"/>
        <!--set to 9 minutes.-->
        <!--Set the cache expiry time slightly lower than the backend token expiry time-->
    </ExpirySettings>
    <Source>advanaToken</Source>
</PopulateCache>

SC-Advana-Token.name: SC-Advana-Token
SC-Advana-Token.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ServiceCallout async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="SC-Advana-Token">
    <DisplayName>SC-Advana-Token</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <Request clearPayload="true" variable="myRequest">
        <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>false</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
        <Set>
            <FormParams>
                <FormParam name="client_id">{private.advana_client_id}</FormParam>
                <FormParam name="client_secret">{private.advana_client_secret}</FormParam>
                <!--<FormParam name="scope">{private.advana_scopes}</FormParam>-->
                <FormParam name="grant_type">client_credentials</FormParam>
            </FormParams>
        </Set>
    </Request>
    <Response>advanaTokenResponse</Response>
    <HTTPTargetConnection>
        <URL>https://catalog.advana.data.mil/auth/sessions</URL>
        <Properties/>
    </HTTPTargetConnection>
</ServiceCallout>
